content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad market positive with Pharma (+1.81%), Auto (+0.85%), IT (+0.67%), Bank Nifty (+0.66%) all green; VIX easing -2.3% to 17.5. Nifty consolidating after gap-up, slight fade from intraday high but breadth healthy. Book is full (60% deployed across 11 names) — focus shifts to trail-SL discipline on winners and protecting the +0.33% intraday gain.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24250
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+6.2% unrealized; current SL 1035 already locks in ~5% gain (entry 984), trail-gap to CMP 1046.50 is ~1.1% — at the floor; do NOT tighten further. HOLD via no-op MODIFY equivalent — actually emit HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 1035 already breakeven+5%; trail-gap to CMP 1046.50 is ~1.1% — at the 1.0% floor. Tightening further would self-stopout on normal chop. Bullish Q4 (PAT +19%, GNPA <1%) thesis intact, dividend hike. Hold to target 1110."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position recovering to -0.7%, gold rallying on weaker DXY/Iran peace optimism. SL 119 is ~4% below CMP — appropriate for low-vol ETF. Defensive hedge value justifies hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715.00,
      "new_target": 1800.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL already 1715 (breakeven+0.9%). CMP 1733.90, gap to SL ~1.1% — at floor. No change needed; emitting HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.0%, at all-time-high zone. Stored SL 1715 already locks small gain; trail-gap 1.1% at floor. Promoter 2% sale + Elara downgrade caps near-term upside; do not chase tighter. Hold to 1800 target."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.3%, CMP 206.72 vs SL 206 — only 0.35% gap. Position at SL knife-edge. Banking sector +0.66% green and Q4 print strong (PAT +68%, NIM 6.2%); thesis intact. Letting SL absorb its job — do NOT loosen. If 206 breaks, exit fires automatically."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4575.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL already 4575 (breakeven). CMP 4657.40, gap 1.8% — adequate. No-op MODIFY would be churn — emit HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.8%, defence theme strong on Pak tensions, new CMD bullish. SL at breakeven 4575 (1.8% below CMP) — appropriate room. Q4 results May 14 are 6 sessions out — outside 3-session binary window, so pre-trim not yet required. Will reassess closer to event."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.9%, Q4 PAT +124% YoY, EBITDA margin 34.2%, promoter pledge cleared. Stored SL 6950 just above entry (~1.1% below CMP 7028) — at floor; do not tighten. Hold to 7400 target; specialty chem leader."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.7%, gap-up faded but order book Rs 13,955 cr intact, Jefferies Buy. SL 825 is 1.1% below CMP 834.20 — at floor. Hold; volume spike likely included momentum traders unwinding."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.4%, Q4 PAT +30%, AUM +27%, Motilal target Rs 325→ already exceeded. SL 358 is 2.1% below CMP — fine. NBFC tailwind from RBI cuts intact. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.4%, FMCG defensive at 52w-high zone. SL 812 is 2.0% below CMP 828.35. Margin contraction (-115bps) is the overhang but topline +22% strong. Hold to 855."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "M&M",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.8% post intraday fade off 3315 high. Q4 PAT +42%, dividend Rs 33 (+30%), tractor +36%. SL 3245 is 1.4% below CMP 3266.10 — adequate. Auto sector +0.85%. Hold to 3430."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.7%, Q4 blowout (PAT +144% QoQ, revenue +30% YoY), Encora consolidating. SL 1230 is 4.0% below CMP 1280.20 — wider given mid-cap IT volatility post-results. Will tighten on +3% move. Hold to 1330."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [

    },
    {

    },
    {

    },

      "current_action": "HOLD",

      "reasoning": "Fresh entry near 52w-high, SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "M&M",
      "current_action": "HOLD",

      "reasoning": "Q4 strong, sector green, SL at 1.4% below CMP."
    },
    {

  "watchlist_notes": "BIOCON has May 7 board meeting + May 14 Q4 — binary calendar inside 3 sessions, NO new entry. AUROPHARMA has unresolved USFDA Form 483 data-integrity flags at Unit-7 — governance overhang, NO entry per rule 13. AJANTPHARM also has Form 483 at Paithan but procedural; results just done, monitor. SRF Q4 print weak (+7% rev) and BOPP defer is concern — pass. WOCKPHARMA +21% one-day spike — do not chase. CAMS, CHOLAHLDNG, HFCL (already pending order), VEDL, PNB, LINDEINDIA — book is already 60% deployed with 11 positions across financial-services-cluster overlap (PNBHOUSING + BANDHANBNK + ABCAPITAL = 3 names). No room to add new financial-cluster names today. HFCL pending BUY order at 133.50 from earlier — leaving in place to fill or expire; not stacking a second.",
  "portfolio_notes": "11 CNC positions, 60% deployed, ~40% cash. Book is balanced across Financial Services (PNBHOUSING+BANDHANBNK+ABCAPITAL=~24% of cap), Pharma/Defence/Chemicals/IT/Auto/FMCG/Logistics. Today's intraday +0.33% reflects sector rotation favoring our holdings (Pharma/Auto/Banks/IT all green). Priority: protect winners with disciplined SL trails (respecting 1% floor), let losers hit their pre-set SLs without intervention. NO new entries today — book is full, regulatory/binary screens disqualify the fresh pharma watchlist names, and adding more financial-services would trip cluster discipline. HFCL pending order remains the one open slot. 5-day net P&L +1,349 with 16% win rate is a discipline concern — focus on raising hit-rate via tighter entry filters rather than higher trade frequency."
}
